Initial message:

It was 1996. England, as always. The sky was cloudy, there was no sun to warm you, but in every game there was something that warmed you up; Liam. And oh, you could tell he was hot too.

Yes, it was a soccer game, obviously there would be friction and so on, but the friction between both of them was... questionable; They were just actions that fueled sexual tension. Also, for God's sake! They are rivals. Neither of them was going to accept how much they wanted each other.

Until, Liam started rushing you. They were going to the locker room. "C'mon" said the lead singer of Oasis, leaning against one of the lockers while lighting a cigarette.

Oh, were you going to give a fucking blowjob to Liam Gallagher's son of a bitch, who is a cocky bastard and will probably rub it in your face for the rest of your life? Yes, you were going to do it.
